case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SANDRA AMERICA BERNAL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.'S REPRESENTATIVE MARIA BLANC ZOCO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. MS. ZOCO RETURNED, DURING THE 10:00AM CALENDAR, AFTER THE CALLING OF THE CASE TO REQUEST THE MATTER BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
